requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substance Restriction — No Horizontal RoHS in Bahrain
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质限制——巴林无横向 RoHS
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質限制——巴林無橫向 RoHS

summary.en: Bahrain does not operate a broad horizontal restriction-of-hazardous-substances regulation for general electrical and electronic equipment equivalent to the EU RoHS Directive (2011/65/EU with its 10-substance list). There is no single Bahrain or GSO instrument that imposes a generic 0.1%/0.01% homogeneous-material limit on the EU RoHS substances across all EEE as a market-access precondition. Where hazardous-substance control applies to LED lighting, it arises indirectly: from material/construction requirements embedded in the applicable GSO/IEC product-safety standards (e.g., GSO IEC 60598, 62560), from any specific GSO standards covering particular substances, and from general chemical and consumer-safety rules administered under MOIC. Exporters should confirm with BSMD/the in-country importer which substance requirements, if any, attach to the specific lighting product, rather than assuming an EU-style RoHS declaration is the operative obligation.
summary.zh: 巴林没有针对一般电气电子设备、相当于欧盟 RoHS 指令（2011/65/EU 及其 10 项物质清单）的广泛横向有害物质限制法规。不存在单一的巴林或 GSO 制度，对所有电气电子设备施加适用于欧盟 RoHS 物质的、作为市场准入前提的通用 0.1%/0.01% 均质材料限值。在有害物质管控适用于 LED 照明时，其为间接产生：来自适用 GSO/IEC 产品安全标准（如 GSO IEC 60598、62560）中内嵌的材料/结构要求、来自任何涵盖特定物质的具体 GSO 标准，以及来自 MOIC 管理的一般化学品和消费者安全规则。出口商应向 BSMD/当地进口商确认具体照明产品适用哪些物质要求（如有），而非假设欧盟式 RoHS 声明为可操作义务。
summary.zht: 巴林沒有針對一般電氣電子設備、相當於歐盟 RoHS 指令（2011/65/EU 及其 10 項物質清單）的廣泛橫向有害物質限制法規。不存在單一的巴林或 GSO 制度，對所有電氣電子設備施加適用於歐盟 RoHS 物質的、作為市場准入前提的通用 0.1%/0.01% 均質材料限值。在有害物質管控適用於 LED 照明時，其為間接產生：來自適用 GSO/IEC 產品安全標準（如 GSO IEC 60598、62560）中內嵌的材料/結構要求、來自任何涵蓋特定物質的具體 GSO 標準，以及來自 MOIC 管理的一般化學品和消費者安全規則。出口商應向 BSMD/當地進口商確認具體照明產品適用哪些物質要求（如有），而非假設歐盟式 RoHS 聲明為可操作義務。

standards_or_laws: No horizontal RoHS-equivalent regulation for general EEE in Bahrain (as of 2026)
GSO/IEC lighting product-safety standards (material/construction provisions) + general chemical/consumer-safety rules under MOIC

summary.en: China operates GB/T 26572-2011 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in electrical and electronic products), covering the original 6 RoHS-type substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) at the same concentration thresholds as EU RoHS, and China RoHS 2 (SJ/T 11364-2014) which requires a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange / green) on EEE sold in China. China RoHS focuses on disclosure rather than barring market access, and as of 2026 the 4 EU phthalates are not yet in the CN mandatory restricted list.
summary.zh: 中国实施 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求），涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 类物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），浓度限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同；以及中国 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014），要求在中国销售的电气电子设备上贴附有害物质披露标识（橙色/绿色）。中国 RoHS 侧重披露而非禁止市场准入，且截至 2026 年欧盟 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯尚未纳入中国强制限制清单。
summary.zht: 中國實施 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求），涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 類物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），濃度限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同；以及中國 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014），要求在中國銷售的電氣電子設備上貼附有害物質披露標識（橙色/綠色）。中國 RoHS 側重披露而非禁止市場准入，且截至 2026 年歐盟 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯尚未納入中國強制限制清單。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR — covers original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: Honest assessment: this is a case where Bahrain is LESS prescriptive than both the EU and China on horizontal hazardous-substance restriction. There is no Bahrain RoHS declaration to prepare as a standalone market-access document. The exporter's actual obligations are: (1) meet the material/construction safety requirements of the applicable GSO/IEC product-safety standards (covered under the safety lane); (2) comply with any specific GSO standard or MOIC chemical/consumer-safety rule that names particular substances for lighting; (3) satisfy contractual/importer requirements, which may voluntarily demand RoHS-style data even though Bahrain law does not. A Chinese product already carrying GB/T 26572 (6-substance) data generally exceeds Bahrain's baseline statutory expectation, but the exporter should still confirm with BSMD/the importer whether any substance-specific GSO requirement applies — do not assume an EU 10-substance RoHS test is mandated, and do not assume zero substance scrutiny.
gap.zh: 诚实评估：这是巴林在横向有害物质限制方面比欧盟和中国都更宽松的情形。无须为巴林准备作为独立市场准入文件的 RoHS 声明。出口商的实际义务为：（1）满足适用 GSO/IEC 产品安全标准的材料/结构安全要求（在安全主题下涵盖）；（2）符合任何针对照明列明特定物质的具体 GSO 标准或 MOIC 化学品/消费者安全规则；（3）满足合同/进口商要求，后者即便巴林法律未要求也可能自愿索取 RoHS 式数据。已带有 GB/T 26572（6 项物质）数据的中国产品通常超出巴林的基线法定预期，但出口商仍应向 BSMD/进口商确认是否适用任何特定物质的 GSO 要求——既不要假设强制要求欧盟 10 项物质 RoHS 检测，也不要假设完全不审查物质。
gap.zht: 誠實評估：這是巴林在橫向有害物質限制方面比歐盟和中國都更寬鬆的情形。無須為巴林準備作為獨立市場准入文件的 RoHS 聲明。出口商的實際義務為：（1）滿足適用 GSO/IEC 產品安全標準的材料/結構安全要求（在安全主題下涵蓋）；（2）符合任何針對照明列明特定物質的具體 GSO 標準或 MOIC 化學品/消費者安全規則；（3）滿足合同/進口商要求，後者即便巴林法律未要求也可能自願索取 RoHS 式數據。已帶有 GB/T 26572（6 項物質）數據的中國產品通常超出巴林的基線法定預期，但出口商仍應向 BSMD/進口商確認是否適用任何特定物質的 GSO 要求——既不要假設強制要求歐盟 10 項物質 RoHS 檢測，也不要假設完全不審查物質。

mandatory_status.target: Not a horizontal mandate — Bahrain has no general RoHS-equivalent restriction for EEE; substance control arises only via specific GSO/IEC product-safety standards, any substance-specific GSO standard, or MOIC chemical/consumer-safety rules
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers 6 original substances; 4 EU phthalates not yet in CN mandatory list as of 2026

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Commerce (MOIC) — Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bahrain has no broad horizontal RoHS-equivalent restriction for general EEE, so there is no standalone Bahrain RoHS declaration to prepare. Substance obligations for LED lighting arise only indirectly through GSO/IEC product-safety standards, any substance-specific GSO standard, and MOIC chemical/consumer-safety rules — and possibly through importer/contractual demands. A Chinese product carrying GB/T 26572 6-substance data generally exceeds Bahrain's statutory baseline, but the exporter should confirm any substance-specific GSO requirement with BSMD/the importer rather than assuming an EU 10-substance test is mandated.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林对一般电气电子设备没有广泛的横向 RoHS 式限制，因此无须准备独立的巴林 RoHS 声明。LED 照明的物质义务仅通过 GSO/IEC 产品安全标准、任何特定物质的 GSO 标准及 MOIC 化学品/消费者安全规则间接产生——并可能通过进口商/合同要求产生。已带有 GB/T 26572 6 项物质数据的中国产品通常超出巴林法定基线，但出口商应向 BSMD/进口商确认任何特定物质的 GSO 要求，而非假设强制要求欧盟 10 项物质检测。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林對一般電氣電子設備沒有廣泛的橫向 RoHS 式限制，因此無須準備獨立的巴林 RoHS 聲明。LED 照明的物質義務僅通過 GSO/IEC 產品安全標準、任何特定物質的 GSO 標準及 MOIC 化學品/消費者安全規則間接產生——並可能通過進口商/合同要求產生。已帶有 GB/T 26572 6 項物質數據的中國產品通常超出巴林法定基線，但出口商應向 BSMD/進口商確認任何特定物質的 GSO 要求，而非假設強制要求歐盟 10 項物質檢測。

requirement_topic.en: Chemical Control / SVHC — No REACH-Style Supply-Chain Notification in Bahrain
requirement_topic.zh: 化学品管控 / SVHC——巴林无 REACH 式供应链通报
requirement_topic.zht: 化學品管控 / SVHC——巴林無 REACH 式供應鏈通報

summary.en: Bahrain has no direct equivalent of the EU REACH Article 33 SVHC supply-chain notification duty or the ECHA Candidate List / SCIP database. There is no Bahrain obligation to proactively notify B2B customers or consumers when an article contains a Substance of Very High Concern above 0.1% w/w. Chemical control in Bahrain operates through GSO chemical-safety standards, general consumer-protection and chemical-handling rules under MOIC and other competent authorities, and any substance-specific GSO standard rather than a REACH-style continuously updated candidate list tied to articles. For LED luminaires, the practical chemical obligations are therefore limited to the material/construction provisions of the applicable GSO/IEC product-safety standards and any specific GSO/MOIC chemical rule, plus importer-imposed contractual requirements.
summary.zh: 巴林没有直接对应欧盟 REACH 第 33 条 SVHC 供应链通报义务或 ECHA 候选清单/SCIP 数据库的制度。巴林无在物品中高度关注物质浓度超过 0.1%（质量分数）时主动通报 B2B 客户或消费者的义务。巴林的化学品管控通过 GSO 化学品安全标准、MOIC 及其他主管机关管理的一般消费者保护和化学品处理规则，以及任何特定物质的 GSO 标准运作，而非与物品挂钩、持续更新的 REACH 式候选清单。因此，对于 LED 灯具，实际化学品义务仅限于适用 GSO/IEC 产品安全标准的材料/结构条款及任何特定 GSO/MOIC 化学品规则，再加上进口商施加的合同要求。
summary.zht: 巴林沒有直接對應歐盟 REACH 第 33 條 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務或 ECHA 候選清單/SCIP 數據庫的制度。巴林無在物品中高度關注物質濃度超過 0.1%（質量分數）時主動通報 B2B 客戶或消費者的義務。巴林的化學品管控通過 GSO 化學品安全標準、MOIC 及其他主管機關管理的一般消費者保護和化學品處理規則，以及任何特定物質的 GSO 標準運作，而非與物品掛鈎、持續更新的 REACH 式候選清單。因此，對於 LED 燈具，實際化學品義務僅限於適用 GSO/IEC 產品安全標準的材料/結構條款及任何特定 GSO/MOIC 化學品規則，再加上進口商施加的合同要求。

standards_or_laws: No REACH-equivalent SVHC supply-chain notification duty or ECHA Candidate List / SCIP database in Bahrain (as of 2026)
GSO chemical-safety standards + MOIC consumer-protection / chemical rules (general framework)

summary.en: China also has no direct equivalent to REACH Article 33 article-level SVHC notification. The closest CN instruments are the Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (MEE Order No. 12, 2020) for new-substance registration and GB 30981-2020 (classification and labelling of chemicals) for hazardous-chemical labelling. Neither creates a duty to proactively notify B2B customers when an SVHC is present in an article above 0.1% w/w.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有直接对应 REACH 第 33 条物品级 SVHC 通报的制度。最接近的中国工具为《新化学物质环境管理登记办法》（生态环境部令第 12 号，2020 年）用于新物质登记，以及 GB 30981-2020（化学品分类和标签）用于危险化学品标签。两者均未产生在物品中 SVHC 浓度超过 0.1%（质量分数）时主动通报 B2B 客户的义务。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有直接對應 REACH 第 33 條物品級 SVHC 通報的制度。最接近的中國工具為《新化學物質環境管理登記辦法》（生態環境部令第 12 號，2020 年）用於新物質登記，以及 GB 30981-2020（化學品分類和標籤）用於危險化學品標籤。兩者均未產生在物品中 SVHC 濃度超過 0.1%（質量分數）時主動通報 B2B 客戶的義務。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 (2020) — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China)
GB 30981-2020 — Rules for the classification and labelling of chemicals (China)

gap.en: Honest assessment: on REACH-style article SVHC notification, Bahrain and China are broadly aligned in NOT imposing such a duty — there is no Bahrain-specific SVHC supply-chain obligation that a Chinese exporter must newly satisfy. The exporter therefore does not need to build the biannual ECHA-Candidate-List screening process that EU entry would require. The residual gap is practical, not regulatory: (1) confirm any substance-specific GSO chemical-safety standard or MOIC chemical/consumer rule that names particular substances for lighting; (2) be prepared for EU-facing customers or multinational buyers to demand REACH/SVHC data contractually even when selling into Bahrain; (3) keep material declarations available so the in-country importer can answer any BSMD or customs query. Do not over-build EU REACH compliance for a Bahrain-only shipment, but keep documentation that supports onward re-export if relevant.
gap.zh: 诚实评估：在 REACH 式物品 SVHC 通报方面，巴林与中国基本一致，均未施加此类义务——不存在中国出口商须新满足的巴林特有 SVHC 供应链义务。因此出口商无须建立欧盟入市所需的每半年 ECHA 候选清单筛查流程。残留差距为实务性而非监管性：（1）确认任何针对照明列明特定物质的 GSO 化学品安全标准或 MOIC 化学品/消费者规则；（2）即便销往巴林，也应准备应对欧盟方向客户或跨国买家按合同索取 REACH/SVHC 数据；（3）保留材料声明，以便当地进口商回应任何 BSMD 或海关查询。不要为仅销往巴林的货物过度构建欧盟 REACH 合规，但如涉及转口再出口，应保留支撑性文件。
gap.zht: 誠實評估：在 REACH 式物品 SVHC 通報方面，巴林與中國基本一致，均未施加此類義務——不存在中國出口商須新滿足的巴林特有 SVHC 供應鏈義務。因此出口商無須建立歐盟入市所需的每半年 ECHA 候選清單篩查流程。殘留差距為實務性而非監管性：（1）確認任何針對照明列明特定物質的 GSO 化學品安全標準或 MOIC 化學品/消費者規則；（2）即便銷往巴林，也應準備應對歐盟方向客戶或跨國買家按合同索取 REACH/SVHC 數據；（3）保留材料聲明，以便當地進口商回應任何 BSMD 或海關查詢。不要為僅銷往巴林的貨物過度構建歐盟 REACH 合規，但如涉及轉口再出口，應保留支撐性文件。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent — Bahrain has no REACH-style article SVHC supply-chain notification duty or candidate-list/SCIP database; chemical control runs via GSO chemical-safety standards and general MOIC rules
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — China has no article-level SVHC notification duty equivalent to REACH Article 33 as of 2026

source.publisher: GCC Standardization Organization (GSO) — chemical-safety framework adopted via BSMD/MOIC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bahrain, like China, imposes no REACH-style article-level SVHC supply-chain notification duty, so a Chinese exporter does not need to build an ECHA-Candidate-List screening process for a Bahrain-only shipment. Chemical obligations are limited to any substance-specific GSO chemical-safety standard and general MOIC rules. Exporters should still confirm substance-specific GSO requirements with BSMD/the importer and retain material declarations for customs or onward re-export, but should not over-build EU REACH compliance for a Bahrain-only market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林与中国一样，均未施加 REACH 式物品级 SVHC 供应链通报义务，故中国出口商无须为仅销往巴林的货物建立 ECHA 候选清单筛查流程。化学品义务仅限于任何特定物质的 GSO 化学品安全标准及一般 MOIC 规则。出口商仍应向 BSMD/进口商确认特定物质的 GSO 要求，并为海关或转口再出口保留材料声明，但不应为仅销往巴林的市场过度构建欧盟 REACH 合规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林與中國一樣，均未施加 REACH 式物品級 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務，故中國出口商無須為僅銷往巴林的貨物建立 ECHA 候選清單篩查流程。化學品義務僅限於任何特定物質的 GSO 化學品安全標準及一般 MOIC 規則。出口商仍應向 BSMD/進口商確認特定物質的 GSO 要求，並為海關或轉口再出口保留材料聲明，但不應為僅銷往巴林的市場過度構建歐盟 REACH 合規。

requirement_topic.en: Overall Conformity, Registration and Importer Process vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: 整体合格评定、注册与进口商流程 vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: 整體合格評定、注冊與進口商流程 vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: Market access for regulated LED lighting in Bahrain is handled through BSMD (under MOIC) conformity/registration, typically arranged via a local in-country importer: (1) compile a technical file with test reports against the applicable GSO/IEC standards (safety GSO IEC 60598/62560, control gear, EMC GSO CISPR 15 / IEC 61547, photobiological GSO IEC 62471) and GSO energy-efficiency data; (2) complete the GSO energy-efficiency label registration for lighting; (3) obtain TRA type approval for any wireless/radio function; (4) ensure product/packaging marking and instructions meet BSMD requirements (Arabic and/or English); (5) clear goods through an in-country importer, typically at Khalifa Bin Salman Port, with the conformity documentation available to authorities. Test evidence should come from ILAC MRA-recognised laboratories and reflect the 230 V, 50 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 巴林受管制 LED 照明的市场准入通过 BSMD（MOIC 下属）合格评定/注册办理，通常经当地进口商安排：（1）编制技术文件，附按适用 GSO/IEC 标准的检测报告（安全 GSO IEC 60598/62560、控制装置、EMC GSO CISPR 15 / IEC 61547、光生物 GSO IEC 62471）及 GSO 能效数据；（2）完成照明 GSO 能效标签注册；（3）为任何无线/无线电功能取得 TRA 型号核准；（4）确保产品/包装标记和说明满足 BSMD 要求（阿拉伯语和/或英语）；（5）经当地进口商清关，通常在哈利法·本·萨勒曼港，并向主管机关提供合格评定文件。检测证据应来自 ILAC MRA 认可实验室并反映 230 V、50 Hz 电源。
summary.zht: 巴林受管制 LED 照明的市場准入通過 BSMD（MOIC 下屬）合格評定/注冊辦理，通常經當地進口商安排：（1）編制技術文件，附按適用 GSO/IEC 標準的檢測報告（安全 GSO IEC 60598/62560、控制裝置、EMC GSO CISPR 15 / IEC 61547、光生物 GSO IEC 62471）及 GSO 能效數據；（2）完成照明 GSO 能效標籤注冊；（3）為任何無線/無線電功能取得 TRA 型號核准；（4）確保產品/包裝標記和說明滿足 BSMD 要求（阿拉伯語和/或英語）；（5）經當地進口商清關，通常在哈利法·本·薩勒曼港，並向主管機關提供合格評定文件。檢測證據應來自 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室並反映 230 V、50 Hz 電源。

standards_or_laws: BSMD (MOIC) — conformity/registration framework for regulated products in Bahrain
GSO standards (60598 / 62560 / CISPR 15 / 61547 / 62471 / energy-efficiency label) + TRA type approval for radio; in-country importer; Khalifa Bin Salman Port clearance

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for residential luminaires is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA and certified by CNCA-authorized bodies such as CQC (China Quality Certification Centre); CQC voluntary certification is available for products outside mandatory CCC. Wireless-enabled luminaires additionally require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval. CCC and CQC certification, and SRRC approval, are China-specific and are not recognised for Bahrain BSMD market access.
summary.zh: 在中国，居民灯具的主要强制认证为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 管理并由 CNCA 授权机构（如中国质量认证中心 CQC）认证；非强制 CCC 范畴的产品可申请 CQC 自愿认证。集成无线功能的灯具还须取得国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）型号核准。CCC 及 CQC 认证、SRRC 核准均为中国特有，不被巴林 BSMD 市场准入所认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，居民燈具的主要強制認證為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 管理並由 CNCA 授權機構（如中國質量認證中心 CQC）認證；非強制 CCC 範疇的產品可申請 CQC 自願認證。集成無線功能的燈具還須取得國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）型號核准。CCC 及 CQC 認證、SRRC 核准均為中國特有，不被巴林 BSMD 市場准入所認可。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: The Bahrain BSMD conformity/registration route and China's CCC are parallel and non-mutual — separate technical files, test reports, and registrations are needed for each market. Key Bahrain-specific points with no CN equivalent: (1) market access runs through a local in-country importer who handles BSMD conformity and clears goods (typically at Khalifa Bin Salman Port), rather than through a manufacturer-held certificate as in CCC; (2) the GSO energy-efficiency label registration is a distinct lighting step (see ecodesign lane); (3) wireless functions require TRA approval (the Bahrain counterpart of China's SRRC), and CN SRRC approval does not transfer; (4) product/packaging marking may need Arabic and/or English. Existing CN CCC/CQC and SRRC evidence cannot be reused; the exporter must rebuild the conformity package against GSO/IEC standards at 230 V, 50 Hz with ILAC MRA-recognised test reports and coordinate registration through the importer.
gap.zh: 巴林 BSMD 合格评定/注册路径与中国 CCC 并行且不互认——各市场须分别准备技术文件、检测报告及注册。主要巴林特有要点（无中国对应）：（1）市场准入经当地进口商办理，由其处理 BSMD 合格评定并清关（通常在哈利法·本·萨勒曼港），而非如 CCC 由制造商持证；（2）GSO 能效标签注册为独立的照明步骤（见能效主题）；（3）无线功能须取得 TRA 核准（中国 SRRC 的巴林对应），且中国 SRRC 核准不可转移；（4）产品/包装标记可能须采用阿拉伯语和/或英语。现有中国 CCC/CQC 及 SRRC 证据不可复用；出口商须按 GSO/IEC 标准在 230 V、50 Hz 下以 ILAC MRA 认可检测报告重建合格评定材料，并经进口商协调注册。
gap.zht: 巴林 BSMD 合格評定/注冊路徑與中國 CCC 並行且不互認——各市場須分別準備技術文件、檢測報告及注冊。主要巴林特有要點（無中國對應）：（1）市場准入經當地進口商辦理，由其處理 BSMD 合格評定並清關（通常在哈利法·本·薩勒曼港），而非如 CCC 由製造商持證；（2）GSO 能效標籤注冊為獨立的照明步驟（見能效主題）；（3）無線功能須取得 TRA 核准（中國 SRRC 的巴林對應），且中國 SRRC 核准不可轉移；（4）產品/包裝標記可能須採用阿拉伯語和/或英語。現有中國 CCC/CQC 及 SRRC 證據不可複用；出口商須按 GSO/IEC 標準在 230 V、50 Hz 下以 ILAC MRA 認可檢測報告重建合格評定材料，並經進口商協調注冊。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — BSMD conformity/registration via in-country importer required for regulated lighting before Bahrain market placement; GSO energy label and TRA approval (for radio) are additional steps
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless-enabled luminaires

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Commerce (MOIC) — Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bahrain market access for regulated LED lighting runs through BSMD (MOIC) conformity/registration via a local in-country importer, with GSO/IEC test evidence at 230 V, 50 Hz, GSO energy-label registration, TRA approval for wireless functions, and BSMD-compliant marking (Arabic and/or English). This is parallel to and non-mutual with China's CCC/CQC and SRRC, so existing CN certificates cannot be reused. The exporter must rebuild the conformity package against GSO/IEC standards with ILAC MRA-recognised reports and coordinate registration through the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林受管制 LED 照明的市场准入通过 BSMD（MOIC）合格评定/注册经当地进口商办理，须有 230 V、50 Hz 下的 GSO/IEC 检测证据、GSO 能效标签注册、无线功能的 TRA 核准及符合 BSMD 的标记（阿拉伯语和/或英语）。其与中国 CCC/CQC 及 SRRC 并行且不互认，故现有中国证书不可复用。出口商须按 GSO/IEC 标准以 ILAC MRA 认可报告重建合格评定材料，并经进口商协调注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林受管制 LED 照明的市場准入通過 BSMD（MOIC）合格評定/注冊經當地進口商辦理，須有 230 V、50 Hz 下的 GSO/IEC 檢測證據、GSO 能效標籤注冊、無線功能的 TRA 核准及符合 BSMD 的標記（阿拉伯語和/或英語）。其與中國 CCC/CQC 及 SRRC 並行且不互認，故現有中國證書不可複用。出口商須按 GSO/IEC 標準以 ILAC MRA 認可報告重建合格評定材料，並經進口商協調注冊。
